title: Quality pass: clippy pedantic cleanup in crossbridge-supervisor
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Run `cargo clippy -p crossbridge-supervisor --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic` and resolve every warning (currently 18). Top categories: cast_possible_truncation, missing_errors_doc, semicolon_if_nothing_returned, match_wild_err_arm, used_underscore_binding.

Acceptance criteria:
- `cargo clippy -p crossbridge-supervisor --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic -D warnings` exits 0.
- No blanket `#[allow(clippy::pedantic)]` or `#[allow(...)]` over whole modules — fix the underlying issues, only allow specific lints with a one-line justification comment when the pedantic suggestion is genuinely worse.
- All existing tests still pass (`cargo test -p crossbridge-supervisor`).
- `cargo fmt --check` clean.
